Appearances:
Plaintiff Redwood Design LLC is present. Represented by Travis Swithenbank.
Attorney Steven Williams is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Wendy Chong is present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney, Thomas E. Drohan.

The Judge Pro Tem Ann Hipshman, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. Case did not settle, trial date will be continued to October 22, 2012 for Settlement Protective Date, per Judge Quidachay. (501/JPT)
